commandsRun.note: Non-disruptive retry per validation guidance; same authentication failure.
Masked config check showed placeholder key prefix 'your_op'.

assertionResults.title: Cut List JSON Structure Passes to Export

steps.action: Generate fixture videos and run transcription in assigned sandbox
steps.observed: Transcription succeeded for clip1.mp4, clip2.mp4, clip3.mp4 (exit 0).

steps.action: Run curation to produce cut list JSON
steps.expected: Cut list JSON includes source_file, start/end, description, order fields
steps.observed: Curation failed with OpenRouter authentication error; no cut list created.

steps.action: Check cut-list availability for export mapping validation
steps.expected: At least one cut list present for export 1:1 event mapping check

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by invalid/revoked OPENROUTER_API_KEY; curation cannot create cut list, so export mapping cannot be validated.

assertionResults.title: Export All Three Formats From Same Cut List

steps.action: Run curation from sandbox transcriptions to generate a single cut list
steps.expected: Curation succeeds and returns cut list ID
steps.observed: Curation failed twice with authentication error; no cut list ID produced.

steps.action: Attempt export precondition check and export command discovery
steps.expected: Export command available and runnable for edl/fcpxml/davinci once cut list exists
steps.observed: Export command exists, but export with missing cut list returns 'not found' because no cut lists exist.

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by upstream curation authentication failure; required source cut list for 3-format export comparison is unavailable.

frictions.description: `transcribe` does not expose a `--data-dir` option while `status`, `curate`, and `export` do.
frictions.resolution: Used command-scoped `SNIPSNAP_DATA_DIR` environment variable for `transcribe` and explicit `--data-dir` for other commands.

blockers.description: OpenRouter authentication fails during curation: API key is invalid/revoked (configured placeholder detected).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried `snipsnap curate` once and verified masked configuration details; both runs failed with the same authentication error.

summary: Tested 2 assigned assertions (VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-011): 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked due to curation authentication failure preventing cut list creation.
